name: Teucrium Commodity Trust
business: Teucrium Commodity Trust is a series trust that operates the Teucrium Sugar Fund (CANE), a commodity pool that issues shares representing an interest in a portfolio of sugar futures contracts. The fund's investment objective is to have daily changes in its net asset value reflect daily changes in a weighted average of three No. 11 sugar futures contracts traded on ICE Futures US.

exposures.sentence: The investment objective of CANE is to have the daily changes in the NAV of the Fund s Shares reflect the daily changes in the sugar market for future delivery as measured by the Benchmark.
